title: Pale Garden Backport: The Garden Awakens
description: The most complete Pale Garden mod. Adds the Pale Oak blocks, the Creaking and more features from The Garden Awakens update
body:
![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1043/239/pale_garden_logo.png)

About the Mod
=============

This mod backport most of the [The Garden Awakens update](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Winter_Drop) features to previous versions of the game.

## Dependencies
- [DeltaBox Lib](https://modrinth.com/mod/deltaboxlib)
- [Architectury](https://modrinth.com/mod/architectury-api)
- [TerraBlender](https://modrinth.com/mod/terrablender)
- If you are using Forge, [Kotlin For Forge](https://modrinth.com/mod/kotlin-for-forge)
- If you are using Fabric, [Fabric Language Kotlin](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-language-kotlin)

![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1057/78/2025-01-04_12.png)

Features
--------

The complete update features are here!

*   Added Pale Oak woodset
*   Added Pale Moss
*   Added Pale Hanging Moss
*   Added Pale Moss Carpet
*   Added Pale Oak Tree
*   Added Pale Garden Biome
*   Added Eyeblossom Flower (Open and Close variants)
*   Added Resin Clump
*   Added Resin Clump as Armor Trim
*   Added Block of Resin
*   Added Resin Bricks block family
*   Added Chiseled Resin Bricks Block
*   Pale Oak Leaves has its particles
*   Wandering Trader sells Pale Oak Sapling
*   Eyeblossom day and night behavior
*   Custom sounds for Resin, Resin Bricks, Creaking, Eyeblossoms and Creaking Heart
*   The Pale Moss Carpet block grows to the side of blocks
*   Creaking Heart and the Creaking mob and behavior
*   Pillagers, Vindicators, Evokers and Illusionists are scared of the Creaking
*   Bees are poisoned by Eyeblossoms
*   The Creaking and Eyeblossoms have emissive textures


![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/998/851/java-2024-10-24-22.png)
![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/998/857/java-2024-10-24-22.png)

FAQ
---

**What about 1.19, 1.21, Fabric?** A Fabric version and the 1.21 updates are in progress! But I can't promise a release date since this is a hobby project!
